description: grendha's high quality sandals capture the sultry summer's essence, the fuss-free design and flirty adornments give a street-chic vibe. Showcase these flats with cropped pants and a pastel hued fitted shirt. Upper Thong style rubber straps with a flower embellishment Smooth footbed with printed floral patterning Outsole Short, stacked heel with perforations and grooves all over Floral grooves on the forefoot and midfoot Sandal care Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
